categories.name: Makeup
categories.description: A comprehensive collection of cosmetics for face, eyes, lips, and nails. This department includes foundations, concealers, eyeshadow palettes, mascaras, lipsticks, and setting sprays designed for everyday wear and professional artistry.

categories.name: Skincare
categories.description: Formulations curated for all skin types and concerns. Features daily essentials and targeted treatments including cleansers, toners, serums, moisturizers, eye creams, face masks, and broad-spectrum sunscreens.

categories.name: Haircare
categories.description: Products dedicated to maintaining healthy hair and effortless styling. Includes cleansing shampoos, hydrating conditioners, deep-conditioning hair masks, scalp treatments, hair dyes, and styling creams or serums.

categories.name: Fragrance
categories.description: A curated selection of personal scents and aromatic products. Includes luxury perfumes, colognes, body mists, roll-ons, and seasonal fragrance gift sets ranging from floral and fresh to woody and oriental notes.

products.name: Velvet Matte Lipstick
products.description: A weightless, highly pigmented lipstick that delivers intense color payoff with a velvety matte finish. Formulated with hydrating botanicals to prevent drying, ensuring comfortable, transfer-resistant wear for up to 8 hours.

details.ingredients: Dimethicone, Isododecane, Synthetic Wax, Jojoba Esters, Vitamin E, Shea Butter, Iron Oxides (CI 77491), Red 7 Lake (CI 15850).
details.howToUse: Define lips with a liner, then apply the lipstick starting from the center of the upper lip moving outward. Repeat on the lower lip.

products.name: HD Liquid Foundation
products.description: A buildable, oil-free foundation that blends seamlessly into the skin to blur imperfections. Delivers a flawless, natural-matte finish that stands up to sweat and humidity.

details.ingredients: Water, Cyclopentasiloxane, Glycerin, Dimethicone, Silica, Titanium Dioxide, Talc, Phenoxyethanol.
details.howToUse: Shake well. Apply a small amount starting at the center of the face and blend outward using a damp beauty sponge or foundation brush.

products.name: Waterproof Volumizing Mascara
products.description: An ultra-black, smudge-proof formula featuring an hourglass brush that grips, lifts, and coats every single lash for dramatic volume and length without clumping.

details.ingredients: Isododecane, Cera Alba (Beeswax), Carnauba Wax, Paraffin, Stearic Acid, Carbon Black (CI 77266).
details.howToUse: Sweep the brush from the root to the tip of lashes in a gentle zigzag motion. Apply a second coat before the first coat dries for added volume.

products.name: Translucent Setting Powder
products.description: A micro-milled, weightless loose powder that sets makeup for all-day wear while absorbing excess oil and creating a soft-focus, photo-ready finish without flashback.

details.ingredients: Talc, Magnesium Myristate, Nylon-12, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Zinc Oxide, Potassium Sorbate.
details.howToUse: Press a powder puff or fluffy brush into the powder, tap off excess, and gently press onto areas prone to shine (T-zone) or over concealer to bake

products.name: Bare Horizon Eyeshadow Palette
products.description: A curated palette containing 12 ultra-blendable neutral shades ranging from soft matte transition tones to high-shine metallic shimmers. Formula features minimal fallout and high color payoff.

details.ingredients: Mica, Synthetic Fluorphlogopite, Magnesium Stearate, Dimethicone, Ethylhexyl Palmitate, Tin Oxide.
details.howToUse: Apply matte shades with a fluffy blending brush across the crease. Use fingers or a dense flat brush to pack metallic shimmers onto the eyelid.

products.name: Aqua Plump Hyaluronic Acid 2%
products.description: A multi-molecular weight hyaluronic serum that sinks deep into skin layers to lock in moisture, instantly smoothing fine lines and plumping a dehydrated complexion.

details.ingredients: Water, Sodium Hyaluronate, Phenoxyethanol, Ethylhexylglycerin, Panthenol (Vitamin B5).
details.howToUse: Apply 2-3 drops onto damp, clean face and neck. Gently pat into skin before applying your heavier creams or moisturizers.

products.name: Balancing Centella Foaming Cleanser
products.description: A pH-balanced, non-stripping gel cleanser formulated with Centella Asiatica to soothe redness and wash away daily impurities while keeping the skin barrier intact.

details.ingredients: Water, Coco-Glucoside, Glycerin, Centella Asiatica Extract, Allantoin, Citric Acid, Green Tea Leaf Extract.
details.howToUse: Massage a dime-sized amount onto wet face in circular motions. Rinse thoroughly with lukewarm water and pat dry with a soft towel.

products.name: C-Glow Radiance Cream
products.description: A lightweight daily gel-cream moisturizer packed with Vitamin C and Ferulic Acid to visibly fade dark spots, combat free radical damage, and brighten dull skin tone.

details.ingredients: Water, 3-O-Ethyl Ascorbic Acid, Ferulic Acid, Vitamin E, Squalane, Sodium Polyacrylate, Orange Peel Oil.
details.howToUse: Apply evenly over your face and neck every morning as the final step of skincare before sunscreen. Avoid the immediate eye area.

products.name: Youth Renewal 0.5% Retinol Night Cream
products.description: An advanced overnight treatment featuring encapsulated retinol to stimulate cell turnover and collagen production, minimizing fine lines, wrinkles, and uneven texture.

details.ingredients: Water, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Retinol, Ceramide NP, Shea Butter, Niacinamide, Sodium Acrylate.
details.howToUse: Apply a pea-sized amount to completely dry face at night. Limit initial use to 2 times a week, gradually increasing frequency as tolerated. Use SPF the next day.

products.name: Clean Screen Mineral Sunscreen SPF 50+
products.description: A 100% mineral sunscreen providing broad-spectrum UVA/UVB protection. Dries down to a weightless, non-greasy matte finish with zero white cast, serving perfectly as a makeup primer.

details.ingredients: Zinc Oxide, Titanium Dioxide, Water, Dimethicone Crosspolymer, Tocopherol (Vitamin E), Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice.
details.howToUse: Apply generously and evenly onto your face and neck 15 minutes before sun exposure. Reapply every 2 hours, or immediately after swimming or sweating.

products.name: Moroccan Argan Oil Deep Repair Mask
products.description: An intensive, deeply conditioning treatment rich in essential fatty acids and Vitamin E designed to revive color-treated, heat-damaged, or over-processed hair.

details.ingredients: Water, Cetearyn Alcohol, Argania Spinosa (Argan) Kernel Oil, Behentrimonium Chloride, Hydrolyzed Keratin, Dimethicone.
details.howToUse: After shampooing, apply a generous amount from mid-lengths to tips. Leave on for 5 to 10 minutes, then rinse thoroughly with cool water.

products.name: Biotin & Collagen Volumizing Shampoo
products.description: A lightweight, sulfate-free formula infused with vitamin B7 biotin and collagen to inject weightless bounce and thickness directly into fine, thinning hair strands.

details.ingredients: Water, Sodium C14-16 Olefin Sulfonate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Biotin, Hydrolyzed Collagen, Polyquaternium-10, Fragrance.
details.howToUse: Apply generously to wet hair, massage into a rich lather from roots to ends, then rinse out thoroughly. Follow with conditioner.

products.name: Rosemary & Mint Scalp Activating Serum
products.description: A concentrated, water-based scalp leave-in serum that leverages rosemary leaf oil and peppermint extract to stimulate follicle circulation, improving hair density over time.

details.ingredients: Water, Alcohol Denat., Rosmarinus Officinalis (Rosemary) Leaf Oil, Mentha Piperita (Peppermint) Oil, Caffeine, Niacinamide.
details.howToUse: Apply a few drops directly onto sections of clean scalp once daily. Massage firmly with fingertips. Do not rinse out; style hair as usual.

products.name: Citrus & Amber Eau de Parfum
products.description: A complex signature fragrance featuring top notes of crushed bergamot and Italian lemon, melting down to a warm heart of patchouli, and finishing on a rich, grounding amber base.

details.ingredients: Alcohol Denat., Fragrance (Parfum), Water, Limonene, Linalool, Citral, Coumarin, Benzyl Salicylate.
details.howToUse: Spray directly onto pulse points—wrists, inner elbows, and the base of the neck. Allow the scent to air dry naturally without rubbing the skin.

settings.bannerSubtitle: Experience perfect radiance and restore your skin to its natural, glowing beauty with our handpicked collection.
settings.announcementText: ✨ COMPLIMENTARY LUXE GIFT BOX ON ORDERS OVER $150 • CODE: LUXEGIFT ✨
